issue.title: map.naver.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://map.naver.com/p?c=15.00,0,0,0,adh&p=G8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg,161.84,10,90,0,0,Float](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmap.naver.com%2Fp%3Fc%3D15.00%2C0%2C0%2C0%2Cadh%26p%3DG8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg%2C161.84%2C10%2C90%2C0%2C0%2CFloat) ### Comment > 언제부턴가 해당 확장프로그렘이 켜져있을때 > 네이버지도에서 로드뷰를 보려고하면 화면이 멈추고 스크린샷과같이 오류가 뜹니다. > 사이트를 새로고침하거나 해당 프로그램을 비활성화를 하면 정상작동됩니다. > > 처음에는 로드뷰를 쓰기 어려울만큼 버벅임과 로드뷰 화질저화등이 발생했는데 > 이 확장프로그램에서 몇가지 설정 변경 후 화질개선과 버벅거림은 없어졌지만 > 첫 실행시 오류가 뜨는건 바뀌지않아요. > 네이버지도 로드뷰 관련 프로그램을 차단하는거같은데 수정부탁드립니다. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/nbbifrcvywgsks80s44cwo804sc0gcwcu7ttg67gbk.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/li7hxnx6q1skcck4s8kkk0wcwkg044wctxta2icodw.png?nc=1)

AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

This is a false positive and should be corrected. > > `duckier.com` is the official website of Duckier, a legitimate VPN service operated by Duckier Interactive FZCO (United Arab Emirates). Blocking the entire domain prevents users from reaching the website, the account area, and the VPN service itself. > > **Expected behavior** > `duckier.com` should not be blocked at the domain level. Please remove the rule that blocks `duckier.com` from the relevant filter list, or whitelist the domain. > > **Steps to reproduce** > 1. Enable AdGuard. > 2. Open https://duckier.com > 3. The site is blocked / does not load. > > Thank you for looking into this and fixing it promptly. ### Screenshots

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://duckier.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fduckier.com%2F) ### Comment > **False positive: the entire duckier.com domain is being blocked** > > AdGuard is currently blocking the whole `duckier.com` website instead of only ads or trackers. This is a false positive and should be corrected. > > `duckier.com` is the official website of Duckier, a legitimate VPN service operated by Duckier Interactive FZCO (United Arab Emirates). Blocking the entire domain prevents users from reaching the website, the account area, and the VPN service itself. > > **Expected behavior** > `duckier.com` should not be blocked at the domain level. Please remove the rule that blocks `duckier.com` from the relevant filter list, or whitelist the domain. > > **Steps to reproduce** > 1. Enable AdGuard. > 2. Open https://duckier.com > 3. The site is blocked / does not load. > > Thank you for looking into this and fixing it promptly. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/sudnc7iada84gg44wwwoo08ss4wogcc9bu7n9528qo.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/or81k7kuiqs440w084kg4skw4k0gcgk9czqg9ozuiw.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.73 System version: | `Linux, pop-OS` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter Tracking protection: | disabled Browsing Security: | disabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.73&system_version=Linux%2C+pop-OS&browser=chrome&filters=2&browsing_security.enabled=false&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false)

issue.title: www.speedweek.com

labels.name: A: By Design
labels.description: The issue cannot be resolved due to technical, ethic, or legal reasons

issue.body:
## Information

### Deutsch

Sehr geehrte Benutzerin, sehr geehrter Benutzer, aufgrund von Gesetzen ([z. B. die Gerichtsentscheidung in Karlsruhe, Deutschland im Jahre 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html)) ist es leider nicht möglich diese Paywall (Adblock-Erkennung) zu umgehen. Vielen Dank für Ihr Verständnis.

### English

Dear user, due to a court decision ([eg the court ruling in Karlsruhe, Germany in 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html) ) it is unfortunately not possible to bypass this paywall (adblock detection). Thank you for your understanding.

issue.title: www.windowscentral.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).
